headline: Cisco is evolving from a networking hardware giant into a broader security, observability and AI infrastructure platform.
whyInvestorsOwnIt: Security and observability growth through Splunk
AI infrastructure demand could support networking growth
bullCase: AI data centre demand increases the value of high-performance networking
Splunk improves Cisco's recurring software and security profile
Cisco continues converting hardware customers into software and services customers
Strong balance sheet supports dividends, buybacks and acquisitions
bearCase: Core networking growth may remain slow
Competition from Arista, cloud providers and security specialists
Large acquisitions may take time to integrate
Cisco may not receive the same AI valuation premium as faster-growing peers
stockLayerView: Cisco looks more like a mature infrastructure compounder than a high-growth AI pure play. The interesting question is whether Splunk, security and AI networking can lift Cisco's growth profile enough to justify a higher valuation.
